title: Sterling NLC101 Dead Lock Standard Night Latch Plate, Chrome
features: Bolt can be held withdrawn with snib, Standard section keyway
Supplied with 5 pin cylinder, brass latch with brass plated cylinder, Brass keys
Left and right hand opening doors, Bolt and knob can be deadlocked from the outside by a full turn of the key
description: Sterling deadlocking nightlatches in Chrome plate. Satin Chrome supplied with sc cylinder. Bolt and knob and be deadlocked from the outside by a full turn of the key. Sterling products are equal to the best in the market and are backed with guarantees of up to 10 years. Sterling is a brand of Burg-Wächter one of the largest manufactures of security products in the world. Burg-Wächter has a proud heritage of over 120 years and are recognised for quality standards across our extensive range of locks, padlocks, safes, post boxes and access control solutions.
